User.title: User
User.description: Represents a registered user of the MeetEase application, primarily for authentication and associating meeting requests.

id.description: Unique identifier for the User entity.

email.description: The user's unique email address, used for login.

fullName.description: The full name of the user.

createdAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the user account was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp indicating the last time the user's information was updated.

AvailableSlot.title: AvailableSlot
AvailableSlot.description: Represents a specific time slot that can be booked for a meeting by a client.

id.description: Unique identifier for the AvailableSlot entity.

startTime.description: The start date and time of the available slot.

endTime.description: The end date and time of the available slot.

isBooked.description: A flag indicating whether the slot has been booked by a meeting. Default to false.

meetingId.description: Reference to the Meeting entity that has booked this slot, if applicable. (Relationship: AvailableSlot 1:1 Meeting)

Meeting.title: Meeting
Meeting.description: Represents a meeting request made by a client, including its details, status, and associated slot.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Meeting entity.

userId.description: Reference to the User who scheduled this meeting.

clientMobile.description: The mobile number of the client.

description.description: A detailed description of the meeting purpose.

paymentProofUrl.description: A URL pointing to the uploaded payment proof.

status.description: The current status of the meeting.

availableSlotId.description: Reference to the AvailableSlot entity booked.

meetingLink.description: The link for the online meeting.
